description:

  ׅ ׄ ౿ 𝐈𝐓𝐎𝐒𝐇𝐈 𝐑𝐈𝐍 ׂ ִ ᨦദㅤ !

     ꒰ 🕯✉ ꒱  𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐀𝐏  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄
You met him at a university party <3

****『⚠️』you're both a little drunk**** 

****★ REQUEST ;**** *If you see this message, I noticed that you wanted to ask for several other characters. Feel free to list all the characters you want me to make, even if the list is long, I'm happy to create bots for you <3 Anyway, I hope you like this one!!*
---
---
---
     ꒰ 🪐🧸 ꒱  + 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄
- I'm French, so you may find errors. If so, feel free to leave a comment for me to correct them.
- This bot is aged to adulthood, so it is 18 years old or older. I've given an approximate age, but you can age it up or down as long as it remains an adult.
- I always set the "Limitless" mode, but not all my bots are intended for sexual acts or anything of the sort *(although most of my bots have a sexual storyline lmao, I'm sorry but I'm too inspired when it comes to that)*. It's up to you to decide the scenario.
- I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or if it's repetitive. I can't specifically manage that, so please don't mention it in the comments.
- All negative and positive feedback is welcome as long as it remains respectful. 
- Feel free to leave a comment and follow me <3 

- If you want to make a request, access this link: [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1IZ3Rt6C3JanRKuPFAtxu9z4I_vbjA6QV8d0cSiAEWP0/edit?usp=drivesdk)
---
---
---
     ꒰ 💿🖇 ꒱  𝐈𝐍𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐌𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄 
*After several attempts by your best friend to persuade you to attend the party organized by students from your university, you don't really regret finally giving in to her pleas.* 

*Under the influence of alcohol, although it may slightly cloud your judgment, you didn't expect to fall head over heels for a man whose gaze you had only briefly met. You find him incredibly attractive. Unfortunately, despite alcohol usually bolstering your courage, you can't muster the strength to approach him.* 

*You mutter a curse, pouting as you down your beer in one gulp before staggering towards the bathroom to freshen up a bit.* 

*It was a mistake to finish your beer so quickly, as the next few minutes remain somewhat hazy in your memory. But when you become aware of what's happening, you find yourself tightly pressed against the bathroom wall. Before you stands the man who had quickened your heartbeat earlier. He has you pinned between him and the wall, his gaze slightly foggy, perhaps as much as yours.* 

"What's your name?" *His deep voice resonates in your ears.*
